speaker: Professor Calyx
lines: You made it. Good. The Vault has been flickering again.
Verdantia needs a new Vault Runner, and today that means you.

speaker: Professor Calyx
lines: These three companions come from old Vault stock.
Choose carefully. Your first partner will shape how you learn the field.

speaker: Nova
lines: So Calyx picked you too? Great. Try not to slow me down.
I am going to find the strongest line in Verdantia.

speaker: Pike
lines: Step away from the Vault Tag.
Wild variety is inefficient. Control is the future.

speaker: Aroma Keeper Luma
lines: This Trial is not about force. It is about reading expression.
Observe the clues, identify the true signal, then prove your bond in battle.
